result.summary: mediawiki.org exposes the public MediaWiki Action API and REST API; I also recorded the OAuth developer page as documentation, with no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface confirmed.

mw_oauth_app.label: MediaWiki OAuth consumer/app
mw_oauth_app.setup: Go to [OAuth/For Developers](https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/OAuth/For_Developers/eo) and register an OAuth consumer/app for your tool. The page describes OAuth 1.0a and OAuth 2.0 options; choose the flow your client supports. After registration, use the resulting app credentials to authorize requests on behalf of a wiki user.
